title: 3K08 (SCP-3008)
description: A mod inspired by SCP-3008 and attempting to recreate its atmosphere
body:
_This mod has nothing to do with the real IKEA store franchise, but is only inspired by it._

⚠️ **The mod requires `refurbished_furniture-neoforge-1.21.1-1.0.16.jar `. This mod is only available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture/download/6623948).**

---
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp)
# https://www.bisecthosting.com/btxdxd
---

**Get stuck in the endless maze of a furniture store, where danger lurks around every corner! Boo!**

In this mod, you will find yourself in SCP-3008, an anomalous zone simulating an endless IKEA store populated by hostile "Employees."

## 🔹 Mod Features:
- IKEA **2048x2048** generation with its own structures
- Day and night shift (6/3 minutes)
- Hostile employees
- Own mining and block placement system
- Lootboxes with resources

_**Please note: that the map generation may take a long time (depends on the processor)**_

## 🤔 How do I generate a map?
![worldcreation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cebc74ecc1ab831fd3bfd4fab75ba46c88749ca.gif)
1. Go to the world creation menu
2. Go to the **World tab**
3. Set the world to **superflat**, *without generating structures*
4. Click on the **Customize button** to modify the world **template**.
5. In the input field, enter: `minecraft:air;tkze:biome_3008`.  
Ready!

The mod doesn't try to replicate SCP-3008 completely, it's just inspired by it.
